stemHtml: An aircraft is equipped with one altimeter that is compensated for position error and another one altimeter that is not. Assuming all other factors are equal, during a straight symmetrical flight…

options.a: the lower the speed, the greater the error between the two altimeters.
options.b: the greater the speed, the lower the error between the two altimeters.
options.c: the error between the two altimeters does not depend on the speed.
options.d: the greater the speed, the greater the error between the two altimeters.
